$comment: Gzipped size budgets enforced by scripts/check-budgets.mjs (npm run check-budgets). 'initial' = assets referenced from dist/index.html (entry script + modulepreloads + stylesheets). Fonts are raw woff2 bytes (already compressed). lazyChunkExceptions maps a chunk name prefix (before the content hash) to a per-chunk cap: ServicesView still carries cytoscape until the C3 flow-map rewrite deletes it; TracesView/LogsView are the C5 evidence-page budgets (30/25 KB, tighter than the default).
